header.title: Proxy Pool
header.description: Store reusable HTTP and SOCKS5 proxies locally, or sync purchased pools straight from integrated providers.

rotation.label: Rotation:
rotation.tooltip: How a profile's rotation pool is applied at launch
rotation.failoverMaxTooltip: Skip proxies slower than this many ms (0 = no limit; falls back to the full pool if none qualify)
rotation.topNTooltip: Round-robin among the fastest N proxies

actions.testAllTooltip: Concurrent health test of every proxy

search.placeholder: Search by proxy name, host, or username...

deleteFiltered.tooltip: Delete every proxy matching the current filter
deleteFiltered.confirm_one: Delete all {{count}} {{scope}} proxy? This cannot be undone — linked profiles keep working with their proxy assignment cleared.
deleteFiltered.confirm_other: Delete all {{count}} {{scope}} proxies? This cannot be undone — linked profiles keep working with their proxy assignment cleared.

groups.chipTooltip: Click to filter · drag proxies here to add them
groups.deleteConfirm: Delete group "{{name}}"? The proxies stay in the pool — they just become ungrouped.

autoGroup.buttonTooltip: Create groups from each proxy's verified country/state/city. Run Test All first so proxies have a detected location.

scheduler.tooltip: Automatically re-test every proxy on a schedule

selection.noGroupsYet: No groups yet — create one first.

table.emptyDescription: Add a proxy manually or paste a batch of proxy strings.

blacklistFilter.cleanTip: Show only proxies not on any checked blocklist
blacklistFilter.blacklistedTip: Show only proxies flagged on a DNS blocklist

bulkDelete.confirm_one: Delete {{count}} selected proxy? Linked profiles will keep working with their proxy assignment cleared.
bulkDelete.confirm_other: Delete {{count}} selected proxies? Linked profiles will keep working with their proxy assignment cleared.

history.title: Health history
history.empty: No history yet. Run a health check (or enable Auto-check) and the latency/status timeline will build up here.

form.descriptionEdit: Update an existing proxy. Leave the masked password unchanged to keep the current value.
form.descriptionCreate: Add a single structured proxy to the local SQLite pool.
form.tipSuffix: into the Host field to auto-fill every field.

batch.title: Batch Add Proxies
batch.descriptionPrefix: Paste one proxy per line. Supported format:

groupModal.description: Group proxies by country or purpose (e.g. USA, UK, Japan). You can target a group when batch-creating profiles.

errors.savePolicy: Could not save the proxy policy.
errors.autoGroup: Auto-group failed. Run Test All first so proxies have a detected country.
errors.deleteProxy: Failed to delete proxy. Remove linked profiles or change their proxy assignment first.
